Name: Pickpocket
Description: Steals an item when hit by another Pokémon.

Name: Hydration
Description: Heals status problems if it is raining.

Name: Immunity
Description: Prevents poisoning.

Name: Clear body
Description: Prevents ability reduction.

Name: Harvest
Description: May create another Berry after one is used.

Name: Fairy aura
Description: Powers up each Pokémon’s Fairy-type moves.

Name: Sharpness
Description: Powers up slicing moves.

Name: Plus
Description: Powers up with MINUS.

Name: Infiltrator
Description: Passes through the foe’s barrier and strikes.

Name: Own tempo
Description: Prevents confusion.

Name: Super luck
Description: Heightens the critical-hit ratios of moves.

Name: Flower veil
Description: Prevents lowering of ally Grass-type Pokémon’s stats.

Name: Merciless
Description: The Pokémon’s attacks become critical hits if the target is poisoned.

Name: Electric surge
Description: Turns the ground into Electric Terrain when the Pokémon enters a battle.

Name: Competitive
Description: Boosts the Sp. Atk stat when a stat is lowered.

Name: Poison touch
Description: May poison targets when a Pokémon makes contact.

Name: Adaptability
Description: Powers up moves of the same type.

Name: Magic bounce
Description: Reflects status- changing moves.

Name: Swarm
Description: Ups BUG moves in a pinch.

Name: Purifying salt
Description: The Pokémon's pure salt protects it from status conditions and halves the damage taken from Ghost-type moves.

Name: Fire mane
Description: Boosts the power of the Pokémon's Fire-type moves by 50%.

Name: Shield dust
Description: Prevents added effects.

Name: Curious medicine
Description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it scatters medicine from its shell, which removes all stat changes from allies.

Name: Aroma veil
Description: Protects allies from attacks that limit their move choices.

Name: Armor tail
Description: The mysterious tail covering the Pokémon's head makes opponents unable to use priority moves against the Pokémon or its allies.

Name: Sand force
Description: Boosts certain moves’ power in a sandstorm.

Name: Guts
Description: Ups ATTACK if suffering.

Name: Limber
Description: Prevents paralysis.

Name: Eelevate
Description: The Pokémon floats off the ground, making it immune to Ground-type moves, as well as the Spikes, Toxic Spikes, and Sticky Web statuses. When the Pokémon knocks out a target with an attack, its highest stat is boosted by 1 stage.

Name: Magician
Description: The Pokémon steals the held item of a Pokémon it hits with a move.

Name: Supreme overlord
Description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, its Attack and Sp. Atk stats are slightly boosted for each of the allies in its party that have already been defeated.

Name: Screen cleaner
Description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, the effects of Light Screen, Reflect, and Aurora Veil are nullified for both opposing and ally Pokémon.

Name: Regenerator
Description: Restores a little HP when withdrawn from battle.

Name: Scrappy
Description: Enables moves to hit Ghost-type foes.

Name: Good as gold
Description: A body of pure, solid gold gives the Pokémon full immunity to other Pokémon's status moves.

Name: Cheek pouch
Description: Restores HP as well when the Pokémon eats a Berry.

Name: Stench
Description: Helps repel wild POKéMON.

Name: Sticky hold
Description: Prevents item theft.

Name: Heavy metal
Description: Doubles the Pokémon’s weight.

Name: Unaware
Description: Ignores any change in ability by the foe.

Name: Motor drive
Description: Raises Speed if hit by an Electric-type move.

Name: Queenly majesty
Description: Its majesty pressures the opposing Pokémon, making it unable to attack using priority moves.

Name: Soundproof
Description: Avoids sound-based moves.

Name: Solid rock
Description: Powers down super­ effective moves.

Name: Gale wings
Description: Gives priority to Flying-type moves.

Name: Reckless
Description: Powers up moves that have recoil damage.

Name: Earth eater
Description: If hit by a Ground-type move, the Pokémon has its HP restored instead of taking damage.

Name: Shed skin
Description: Heals the body by shedding.

Name: Sap sipper
Description: Boosts Attack when hit by a Grass-type move.

Name: Solar power
Description: Boosts Sp. Atk, but lowers HP in sunshine.

Name: Hustle
Description: Trades accuracy for power.

Name: Surge surfer
Description: Doubles the Pokémon’s Speed stat on Electric Terrain.

Name: Lightning rod
Description: Draws electrical moves.

Name: Mummy
Description: Contact with this Pokémon spreads this Ability.

Name: Tangled feet
Description: Raises evasion if the Pokémon is confused.

Name: Synchronize
Description: Passes on status problems.

Name: Minus
Description: Powers up with PLUS.

Name: Vital spirit
Description: Prevents sleep.

Name: Hospitality
Description: When the Pokémon enters a battle, it showers its ally with hospitality, restoring a small amount of the ally's HP

Name: Unseen fist
Description: If the Pokémon uses moves that make direct contact, it can attack the target even if the target protects itself.

Name: Leaf guard
Description: Prevents status problems in sunny weather.

Name: Berserk
Description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Sp. Atk stat when it takes a  hit that causes its HP to become half or less.

Name: Healer
Description: May heal an ally’s status conditions.

Name: No guard
Description: Ensures the Pokémon and its foe’s attacks land.

Name: Toxic debris
Description: Scatters poison spikes at the feet of the opposing team when the Pokémon takes damage from physical moves.

Name: Battle armor
Description: Blocks critical hits.

Name: Flash fire
Description: Powers up if hit by fire.

Name: Cloud nine
Description: Negates weather effects.

Name: Pixilate
Description: Normal-type moves become Fairy-type moves.

Name: Filter
Description: Powers down super­ effective moves.

Name: Hyper cutter
Description: Prevents ATTACK reduction.

Name: Sheer force
Description: Removes added effects to increase move damage.

Name: Water bubble
Description: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves done to the Pokémon and prevents the Pokémon from getting a burn.

Name: Effect spore
Description: Leaves spores on contact.

Name: Friend guard
Description: Reduces damage done to allies.

Name: Pure power
Description: Raises ATTACK.

Name: Steadfast
Description: Raises Speed each time the Pokémon flinches.

Name: Long reach
Description: The Pokémon uses its moves without making contact with the target.

Name: Early bird
Description: Awakens quickly from sleep.

Name: Strong jaw
Description: The Pokémon’s strong jaw gives it tremendous biting power.

Name: Disguise
Description: Once per battle, the shroud that covers the Pokémon can protect it from an attack.

Name: Analytic
Description: Boosts move power when the Pokémon moves last.

Name: Chlorophyll
Description: Raises SPEED in sunshine.

Name: Multiscale
Description: Reduces damage when HP is full.

Name: Poison point
Description: Poisons foe on contact.

Name: Insomnia
Description: Prevents sleep.

Name: Aftermath
Description: Damages the foe landing the finishing hit.

Name: Slush rush
Description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed stat in a hailstorm.

Name: Stamina
Description: Boosts the Defense stat when hit by an attack.

Name: Rough skin
Description: Hurts to touch.

Name: Supersweet syrup
Description: Lowers the evasion of opposing Pokémon by 1 stage when first sent into battle

Name: Opportunist
Description: If an opponent's stat is boosted, the Pokémon seizes the opportunity to boost the same stat for itself.

Name: Light metal
Description: Halves the Pokémon’s weight.

Name: Blaze
Description: Ups FIRE moves in a pinch.

Name: Dry skin
Description: Reduces HP if it is hot. Water restores HP.

Name: Moxie
Description: Boosts Attack after knocking out any Pokémon.

Name: Frisk
Description: The Pokémon can check the foe’s held item.

Name: Stalwart
Description: Ignores the effects of opposing Pokémon’s Abilities and moves that draw in moves.

Name: Intimidate
Description: Lowers the foe’s ATTACK.

Name: Protean
Description: Changes the Pokémon’s type to the type of the move it’s using.

Name: Illusion
Description: Comes out disguised as the Pokémon in back.

Name: Electromorphosis
Description: The Pokémon becomes charged when it takes damage, boosting the power of the next Electric-type move the Pokémon uses.

Name: White smoke
Description: Prevents ability reduction.

Name: Piercing drill
Description: When the Pokémon uses contact moves, it can hit even targets that are protecting themselves, dealing 1/4 of the damage that the move would otherwise deal. Everything aside from the target's protective effects is still triggered.

Name: Justified
Description: Raises Attack when hit by a Dark-type move.

Name: Forecast
Description: Changes with the weather.

Name: Sand stream
Description: Summons a sandstorm.

Name: Innards out
Description: Damages the attacker landing the finishing hit by the amount equal to its last HP.

Name: Mirror armor
Description: Bounces back only the stat-lowering effects that the Pokémon receives.

Name: Fluffy
Description: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

Name: Wandering spirit
Description: The Pokémon exchanges Abilities with a Pokémon that hits it with a move that makes direct contact.

Name: Stall
Description: The Pokémon moves after even slower foes.

Name: Big pecks
Description: Protects the Pokémon from Defense-lowering attacks.

Name: Receiver
Description: The Pokémon copies the Ability of a defeated ally.

Name: Defiant
Description: When its stats are lowered its Attack increases.

Name: Drizzle
Description: Summons rain in battle.

Name: Contrary
Description: Makes stat changes have an opposite effect.

Name: Magic guard
Description: The Pokémon only takes damage from attacks.

Name: Sniper
Description: Powers up moves if they become critical hits.

Name: Magma armor
Description: Prevents freezing.

Name: Tough claws
Description: Powers up moves that make direct contact.

Name: Keen eye
Description: Prevents loss of accuracy.

Name: Quick draw
Description: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

Name: Cute charm
Description: Infatuates on contact.

Name: Iron fist
Description: Boosts the power of punching moves.

Name: Dragonize
Description: The Pokémon's Normal-type moves become Dragon-type moves and their power is boosted by 20%.

Name: Cud chew
Description: When the Pokémon eats a Berry, it will regurgitate that Berry at the end of the next turn and eat it one more time.

Name: Prankster
Description: Gives priority to a status move.

Name: Bulletproof
Description: Protects the Pokémon from some ball and bomb moves.

Name: Sweet veil
Description: Prevents itself and ally Pokémon from falling asleep.

Name: Rivalry
Description: Raises Attack if the foe is of the same gender.

Name: Zero to hero
Description: The Pokémon transforms into its Hero Form when it switches out.

Name: Natural cure
Description: Heals upon switching out.

Name: Sand rush
Description: Boosts the Pokémon’s Speed in a sandstorm.

Name: Moody
Description: Raises one stat and lowers another.

Name: Ripen
Description: Ripens Berries and doubles their effect.

Name: Heatproof
Description: Weakens the power of Fire-type moves.

Name: Sand veil
Description: Ups evasion in a sandstorm.

Name: Inner focus
Description: Prevents flinching.

Name: Cursed body
Description: May disable a move used on the Pokémon.

Name: Levitate
Description: Not hit by GROUND attacks.

Name: Mega launcher
Description: Powers up aura and pulse moves.

Name: Technician
Description: Powers up the Pokémon’s weaker moves.

Name: Rock head
Description: Prevents recoil damage.

Name: Klutz
Description: The Pokémon can’t use any held items.

Name: Fur coat
Description: Halves damage from physical moves.

Name: Pickup
Description: May pick up items.

Name: Flame body
Description: Burns the foe on contact.

Name: Liquid voice
Description: All sound-based moves become Water-type moves.

Name: Snow cloak
Description: Raises evasion in a hailstorm.

Name: Parental bond
Description: Parent and child attack together.

Name: Static
Description: Paralyzes on contact.

Name: Sturdy
Description: Negates 1-hit KO attacks.

Name: Mimicry
Description: Changes the Pokémon’s type depending on the terrain.

Name: Mold breaker
Description: Moves can be used regardless of abilities.

Name: Ice body
Description: The Pokémon regains HP in a hailstorm.

Name: Swift swim
Description: Raises SPEED in rain.

Name: Water absorb
Description: Changes water into HP.

Name: Gooey
Description: Contact with the Pokémon lowers the attacker’s Speed stat.

Name: Huge power
Description: Raises ATTACK.

Name: Weak armor
Description: Physical attacks lower Defense and raise Speed.

Name: Poison heal
Description: Restores HP if the Pokémon is poisoned.

Name: Imposter
Description: It transforms itself into the Pokémon it is facing.

Name: Stance change
Description: The Pokémon changes form depending on how it battles.

Name: Mega sol
Description: Even when the sunlight has not turned harsh, the Pokémon can use its moves as if the weather were harsh sunlight.

Name: Rain dish
Description: Slight HP recovery in rain.

Name: Refrigerate
Description: Normal-type moves become Ice-type moves.

Name: Unnerve
Description: Makes the foe nervous and unable to eat Berries.

Name: Suction cups
Description: Firmly anchors the body.

Name: Aerilate
Description: Normal-type moves become Flying-type moves.

Name: Quick feet
Description: Boosts Speed if there is a status problem.

Name: Torrent
Description: Ups WATER moves in a pinch.

Name: Telepathy
Description: Anticipates an ally’s attack and dodges it.

Name: Drought
Description: Summons sunlight in battle.

Name: Thick fat
Description: Heat-and-cold protection.

Name: Oblivious
Description: Prevents attraction.

Name: Anger point
Description: Raises Attack upon taking a critical hit.

Name: Trace
Description: Copies special ability.

Name: Pressure
Description: Raises foe’s PP usage.

Name: Shadow tag
Description: Prevents the foe’s escape.

Name: Forewarn
Description: Determines what moves the foe has.

Name: Anticipation
Description: Senses the foe’s dangerous moves.

Name: Sand spit
Description: The Pokémon creates a sandstorm when it’s hit by an attack.

Name: Speed boost
Description: Gradually boosts SPEED.

Name: Marvel scale
Description: Ups DEFENSE if suffering.

Name: Illuminate
Description: Encounter rate increases.

Name: Corrosion
Description: The Pokémon can poison the target even if it’s a Steel or Poison type.

Name: Skill link
Description: Increases the frequency of multi-strike moves.

Name: Gluttony
Description: Encourages the early use of a held Berry.

Name: Spicy spray
Description: When the Pokémon takes damage from a move, it burns the attacker.

Name: Volt absorb
Description: Turns electricity into HP.

Name: Hunger switch
Description: The Pokémon changes its form, alternating between its Full Belly Mode and Hangry Mode after the end of each turn.

Name: Overgrow
Description: Ups GRASS moves in a pinch.

Name: Symbiosis
Description: The Pokémon can pass an item to an ally.

Name: Overcoat
Description: Protects the Pokémon from damage from weather.

Name: Unburden
Description: Raises Speed if a held item is used.

Name: Shell armor
Description: Blocks critical hits.

Name: Damp
Description: Prevents self-destruction.

Name: Compound eyes
Description: Raises accuracy.

Name: Snow warning
Description: The Pokémon summons a hailstorm in battle.
